title: ocimum natalense
intro: Ocimum natalense, also known as Natal Basil or Wild Basil, is a shrub-like perennial plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ocimum natalense include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing protection against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
